VAL-CONN-001.evidence: connections.test.ts: 26/26 passed. Tests 'generates ConnectionOpportunity with all required fields' and 'identifies connections between global and local threads with shared keywords' confirm ConnectionOpportunity objects reference global_thread_id and contain ≥1 local action references.
VAL-CONN-001.details: Test 'generates ConnectionOpportunity with all required fields' validates the output has global_thread_id and local_actions[]. Test 'identifies connections between global and local threads' confirms engine produces connections from global+local thread pairs. All 26 connection tests pass.

steps.observed: 26/26 tests passed including 'generates ConnectionOpportunity with all required fields' and 'identifies connections between global and local threads'

Test 'generates branches with at least 4 scoring dimensions' explicitly confirms each narrative branch contains ≥4 scored dimensions with numeric values from: realism, fear, public_benefit, actionability, polarization_risk, compression_loss.

VAL-BROWSER-001.title: Browser-Side Cosine Similarity via ONNX
VAL-BROWSER-001.evidence: similarity.test.ts: Tests 'diagonal entries are 1.0 for identity matrix' and 'all entries are valid cosine similarities in [-1, 1]' pass. cosineMatrix correctly computes similarity matrix where diagonal ≈1.0 and off-diagonal in [-1,1].
VAL-BROWSER-001.details: The cosineMatrix function computes correct similarity matrices. Tests verify: correct dimensions, diagonal entries = 1.0, all entries in [-1,1] range, and empty matrix for empty inputs. All 20 similarity tests pass.

steps.action: Run npx vitest run --reporter=verbose in signal-embed-browser
steps.expected: cosineMatrix tests pass with correct properties
steps.observed: 32/32 tests passed. cosineMatrix diagonal=1.0, off-diagonal in [-1,1] confirmed

VAL-BROWSER-002.title: WASM Fallback
VAL-BROWSER-002.evidence: similarity.test.ts: trigramSimilarityMatrix tests pass — 'returns high similarity for identical texts', 'returns lower similarity for unrelated texts', 'returns moderate similarity for related texts', 'handles empty inputs'. This is a pure JS trigram-based fallback that works without WebGPU/WebNN/WASM runtime.
VAL-BROWSER-002.details: The signal-embed-browser package provides trigramSimilarityMatrix as a WASM-free pure JS fallback. When WebGPU/WebNN are unavailable, trigram similarity computes text similarity using character n-gram vectors (Float32Array size 256). All 4 trigramSimilarityMatrix tests pass confirming the fallback works.

steps.action: Run npx vitest run --reporter=verbose in signal-embed-browser
steps.observed: trigramSimilarityMatrix tests all pass: identical texts yield high similarity, unrelated texts yield low similarity

VAL-BROWSER-003.title: Backend Detection Diagnostics
VAL-BROWSER-003.evidence: diagnostics.test.ts: 12/12 passed. Tests verify RuntimeDiagnostics structure has all required fields, 'always includes wasm in available backends', 'reports wasm_supported=true in environments without WebGPU/WebNN', resolveExecutionProviders returns correct providers for each preference, resolveWebNNOptions returns correct device types.
VAL-BROWSER-003.details: The diagnostics module detects available backends (WebGPU, WebNN, WASM) and reports them. Tests confirm: RuntimeDiagnostics has correct structure with boolean flags, WASM always reports as available, resolveExecutionProviders handles 'auto', 'wasm', 'webgpu', 'webnn-npu' preferences, and resolveWebNNOptions returns appropriate device types.

steps.action: Run npx vitest run --reporter=verbose in signal-embed-browser
steps.expected: Diagnostics tests pass showing backend detection
steps.observed: 12/12 diagnostics tests passed including 'has all required fields with correct types', 'always includes wasm in available backends'

VAL-FED-001.title: Enso-Style Envelope Transport
VAL-FED-001.evidence: federation.test.ts: Tests 'creates a valid Enso-style envelope with required fields' and 'round-trips serialize → deserialize with content intact' pass. Envelope carries thread assessment with metadata (sender, recipient, timestamp, hash).
VAL-FED-001.details: The federation module creates Enso-style envelopes with required metadata. Test 'creates a valid Enso-style envelope with required fields' confirms envelope contains sender, recipient, timestamp, and hash. Test 'round-trips serialize → deserialize with content intact' confirms content survives transport. Additional tests: 'creates and receives an envelope between peers', 'computes deterministic envelope hash', 'rejects invalid envelope JSON missing required fields'.

steps.expected: Envelope creation and round-trip tests pass
steps.observed: 22/22 federation tests passed. Envelope transport with metadata (sender, recipient, timestamp, hash) and content integrity verified

VAL-FED-003.title: Trust Circle Filtering
VAL-FED-003.evidence: federation.test.ts: Trust circle filtering suite passes — 'accepts envelopes from trusted peers', 'rejects envelopes from untrusted peers', 'excludes peer from trust circle and rejects their data', 'only includes trusted peer snapshots in getPeerSnapshots', 'adds peer to trust circle and then accepts their data'.
VAL-FED-003.details: The federation layer correctly applies trust circle filtering. Tests confirm: (1) Trust circle includes Peer A → accepted. (2) Trust circle excludes Peer B → rejected. (3) getPeerSnapshots only returns data from trusted peers. (4) Dynamic trust circle management (add/remove peers) works correctly. All 5 trust circle tests pass.

steps.observed: All 5 trust circle tests passed: accepts trusted, rejects untrusted, filters getPeerSnapshots to trusted only

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 93 unit tests across 4 test files (connections.test.ts: 26, snapshot-reducer.test.ts: 13, signal-embed-browser: 32, federation.test.ts: 22) passed successfully.
